# Crypto-Jews.org — Mos Somos Djudyos

> A project helping descendants of Sephardic Anusim (crypto-Jews / conversos / marranos) explore signs of hidden Jewish ancestry. It offers a free at-home DNA cheek-swab kit as a first, exploratory research step — not a legal determination of Jewish status or eligibility under Israel's Law of Return.

## Key facts
- Audience: people in Latin America, the Iberian Peninsula, and the US Southwest who suspect Sephardic Jewish ancestry through family customs, surnames, or oral tradition.
- Offer: a free mailed cheek-swab DNA kit; collects name, email, mailing address, and country to ship it.
- Honesty note: a DNA result is a starting point for personal and family research. It does not prove Jewish status and is not a determination of Law of Return eligibility, which requires separate documentation and legal review.
- Languages: Spanish (primary), Portuguese, English.

## Pages
- [Home (Spanish)](https://crypto-jews.org/)
- [Home (Portuguese)](https://crypto-jews.org/pt/)
- [Home (English)](https://crypto-jews.org/en/)
- [How It Works](https://crypto-jews.org/how-it-works)
- [FAQ](https://crypto-jews.org/faq)
- [About](https://crypto-jews.org/about)
- [Contact](https://crypto-jews.org/contact)

## Note
This project shares documented history and connects people to genealogical research resources. It does not speak on behalf of the Government of Israel.
